en: The plans of the heart belong to man, but the answer of the tongue is from the LORD.
zh: 心裡的籌劃在於人， 舌頭的應對卻出於耶和華。

en: All the ways of a man are pure in his own eyes, but the LORD weighs the spirit.
zh: 人看自己一切所行的，都是清潔的； 耶和華卻衡量人心。

en: Commit your work to the LORD, and your plans will be established.
zh: 當把你所作的交託耶和華， 你的計劃就必成功。

en: The LORD has made everything for its purpose, even the wicked for the day of trouble.
zh: 耶和華所造的各有目的， 連惡人也是為禍患的日子而造的。

en: Everyone who is arrogant in heart is an abomination to the LORD; be assured, he will not go unpunished.
zh: 心裡驕傲的人都是耶和華厭惡的； 他們必不免受罰。

en: By steadfast love and faithfulness iniquity is atoned for, and by the fear of the LORD one turns away from evil.
zh: 因著憐憫和信實，罪孽得贖； 因為敬畏耶和華，人可以避開罪惡。

en: When a man's ways please the LORD, he makes even his enemies to be at peace with him.
zh: 人所行的，若是蒙耶和華喜悅， 耶和華也使他的仇敵與他和好。

en: Better is a little with righteousness than great revenues with injustice.
zh: 收入少而有公義， 勝過收入多卻毫無正義。

en: The heart of man plans his way, but the LORD establishes his steps.
zh: 人心計劃自己的道路， 他的腳步卻由耶和華指引。

en: An oracle is on the lips of a king; his mouth does not sin in judgment.
zh: 王的嘴裡有 神的判語， 審判的時候，他的口必不差錯。

en: A just balance and scales are the LORD's; all the weights in the bag are his work.
zh: 公正的秤和天平都屬耶和華， 囊中的一切法碼都是他所造的。

en: It is an abomination to kings to do evil, for the throne is established by righteousness.
zh: 作惡是君王所厭惡的， 因為王位是靠賴公義建立的。

en: Righteous lips are the delight of a king, and he loves him who speaks what is right.
zh: 公義的嘴唇是君王所喜悅的； 他喜愛說話正直的人。

en: A king's wrath is a messenger of death, and a wise man will appease it.
zh: 君王的烈怒好像死亡的使者， 唯有智慧人能平息君王的怒氣。

en: In the light of a king's face there is life, and his favor is like the clouds that bring the spring rain.
zh: 君王臉上欣悅的光采，使人得生命； 君王的恩寵好像春日雨雲。

en: How much better to get wisdom than gold! To get understanding is to be chosen rather than silver.
zh: 得智慧勝過得金子， 選擇哲理，勝過選擇銀子。

en: The highway of the upright turns aside from evil; whoever guards his way preserves his life.
zh: 正直人的大道遠離罪惡； 謹守自己道路的，保全自己的性命。

en: Pride goes before destruction, and a haughty spirit before a fall.
zh: 在滅亡以先，必有驕傲； 在跌倒以前，心中高傲。

en: It is better to be of a lowly spirit with the poor than to divide the spoil with the proud.
zh: 存謙卑的心與窮乏人在一起， 勝過與驕傲人同分戰利品。

en: Whoever gives thought to the word will discover good, and blessed is he who trusts in the LORD.
zh: 留心聽訓言的必定得益； 倚靠耶和華的是有福的人。

en: The wise of heart is called discerning, and sweetness of speech increases persuasiveness.
zh: 心中有智慧的必稱為聰明人； 動聽的話能增加說服力。

en: Good sense is a fountain of life to him who has it, but the instruction of fools is folly.
zh: 明慧人的明慧是他生命的泉源； 愚妄人的懲罰就是愚妄。

en: The heart of the wise makes his speech judicious and adds persuasiveness to his lips.
zh: 智慧人的心教導自己的口， 使自己口中的話增加說服力。

en: Gracious words are like a honeycomb, sweetness to the soul and health to the body.
zh: 恩慈的話好像蜂巢中的蜂蜜， 使人心裡甘甜，骨頭健壯。

en: There is a way that seems right to a man, but its end is the way to death.
zh: 有一條路，人以為是正路， 走到盡頭卻是死亡之路。

en: A worker's appetite works for him; his mouth urges him on.
zh: 勞力的人身體的需要促使他勞力； 因為他的飢餓催逼著他。

en: A worthless man plots evil, and his speech is like a scorching fire.
zh: 無賴之徒挖出邪惡， 他口裡的話好像灼熱的火。

en: A dishonest man spreads strife, and a whisperer separates close friends.
zh: 乖謬的人散播紛爭， 搬弄是非的離間親密的朋友。

en: A man of violence entices his neighbor and leads him in a way that is not good.
zh: 強暴的人引誘鄰舍， 領他走邪惡的道路。

en: Whoever winks his eyes plans dishonest things; he who purses his lips brings evil to pass.
zh: 瞇著眼睛的，圖謀乖謬的事； 緊抿著嘴唇的，作成惡事。

en: Gray hair is a crown of glory; it is gained in a righteous life.
zh: 白髮是榮耀的冠冕， 在公義的路上，必能得著。

en: Whoever is slow to anger is better than the mighty, and he who rules his spirit than he who takes a city.
zh: 不輕易動怒的，勝過勇士； 克服己心的，勝過把城攻取的人。

en: The lot is cast into the lap, but its every decision is from the LORD.
zh: 籤拋在人的懷中， 一切決斷卻在於耶和華。
